---
title: "Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados"
subtitle: "BNR CVD case-count briefing, 2023"
description: "A public-facing BNR briefing on hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases in Barbados during 2023."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
page-layout: full
---

# Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
This briefing was produced from Stata-generated outputs and published through Quarto. The analysis is fixed to the 2023 briefing dataset and is designed to be reproducible as a static reporting product.
:::

::: {.grid .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

## A simple count, a clear signal

Counts are the foundation of surveillance. Before rates, trends, models, or dashboards can be interpreted, the basic question must be answered clearly:

**How many people were admitted to hospital with stroke or heart attack, and how did 2023 compare with recent years?**

This briefing summarises hospital-registered cardiovascular cases in Barbados during 2023, comparing weekly case accumulation with the average pattern from 2018 to 2022.

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Briefing snapshot

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Product | Static briefing |
| Briefing ID | `cvd_cases_2023_v1` |
| Target year | 2023 |
| Baseline | 2018–2022 |
| Events | Stroke and heart attack |
| Unit | Hospital-registered event |

:::
:::
:::

:::

## Headline findings

::: {.grid .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body .text-center}

### Women

# 312

Stroke cases in 2023

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body .text-center}

### Men

# 312

Stroke cases in 2023

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body .text-center}

### Women

# 105

Heart attack cases in 2023

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body .text-center}

### Men

# 141

Heart attack cases in 2023

:::
:::
:::

:::

## What we did

We reviewed hospital-registered strokes and heart attacks recorded by the Barbados National Registry for 2023 and compared them with the previous five years.

The briefing focuses on three questions:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### How many?

We counted hospital-registered stroke and heart attack events during 2023.

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### When?

We tracked how cases accumulated week by week through the year.

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Who?

We summarised cases by event type, sex, and age group.

:::
:::
:::

:::

## Cumulative weekly cases

The figure below compares cumulative 2023 case counts with the average annual pattern from 2018 to 2022.

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![Cumulative CVD cases in 2023 compared with the 2018–2022 average.](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_cum_week.png){fig-alt="Line chart showing cumulative weekly stroke and heart attack cases in 2023 compared with the five-year average for 2018 to 2022." width="100%"}

:::
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
Stroke cases remained above the recent five-year average through much of 2023, while heart attack cases were lower than the recent average for much of the year.
:::

## Cases by age, sex, and event type

The figure below shows the age profile of hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases, comparing people under 70 with those aged 70 or older.

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![Age distribution of hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases.](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_age70.png){fig-alt="Bar chart showing the proportion of stroke and heart attack cases under age 70 and age 70 or older, by sex." width="100%"}

:::
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
A substantial share of cardiovascular events occurred before age 70, especially among men. This highlights the continuing burden of premature cardiovascular disease.
:::

## Interpretation

The 2023 case-count pattern shows a contrast between stroke and heart attack activity. Stroke cases were consistently higher than the recent five-year average, while heart attack cases were lower for much of the year.

This difference may reflect changes in disease occurrence, health-seeking behaviour, recognition of emergency symptoms, hospital presentation patterns, or post-pandemic service use. Counts alone cannot explain why the pattern changed, but they provide a clear early signal for further investigation.

## Download the outputs

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Tables

- [Download 2023 case counts by sex and event type](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/tables/cases_2023_sex_event.csv)
- [Download 2023 case counts by age group, sex, and event type](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/tables/age70_2023_sex_event.csv)

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Figure data

- [Download cumulative weekly case data](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/data/cases_2023_cum_week.csv)
- [Download age-group figure data](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/data/cases_2023_age70.csv)

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Figures

- [Download cumulative weekly case figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_cum_week.png)
- [Download age-group figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_age70.png)

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Metadata

- [Download public metadata](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/meta.yml)
- [Download build record](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/build.yml)

:::
:::
:::

:::

## Method note

This briefing uses hospital-registered cardiovascular events recorded by the Barbados National Registry. The target year is 2023. The baseline comparison uses the average annual pattern from 2018 to 2022.

The Stata compute layer generated the tables, figures, figure-ready data, public metadata, and build record. This Quarto page publishes and explains those approved outputs. It does not recreate the analysis.

## Citation

Barbados National Registry. *Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados: BNR CVD case-count briefing, 2023*. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies.
